data.name: Femboy Bangers 2
data.detailed_description:
Femboy on Male

Friday night at 10pm and you feel like getting out of the house.

A drive around town looking for an open pizza place will have to do, but your search is soon interrupted by a bright pink light.
Like a moth to a flame, you are drawn to a banner that reads: "Femboy Bangers".

With your curiosity piqued, you decide to investigate and see what's on offer.

Read through an exciting story as well as some pretty raunchy(erotic) dialogue, accompanied by spicy nude depictions.

Gameplay

Kinetic Visual Novel

H-Scenes
~4K words

data.short_description: A late night drive around town in search of pizza has you stumbling upon a new establishment.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz Pentium 4
  • 記憶體: 400 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
